settings.heroDescription: As we close this chapter and begin new journeys, let's celebrate the friendships, lessons, and memories that shaped us.
settings.quoteText: "Don't cry because it's over, smile because it happened. The memories we made will last a lifetime."
settings.footerDesc: Where futures are built and memories are made.
settings.footerMadeBy: Made with ♥ by the Batch of 2025

teachers.name: Mr.Solomon
teachers.subject: Chairman.
teachers.quote: As you go out into the world, be cautious and vigilant. Guard your lives wisely and keep growing into people of character and purpose.

teachers.name: Mrs.Sharmila Solomon
teachers.subject: Founder & Director
teachers.quote: As you begin another milestone in your journey, I wish each one of you all the best! You will truly be missed and you will always remain in my prayers. May God bless you to live a life of purpose. Love you loads.

teachers.name: Mrs.Shilpa Sethi
teachers.subject: Principal
teachers.quote: Step forward with confidence, chase your dreams with determination, and remember that our blessings and good wishes will always accompany you on every path you choose.

teachers.name: Mrs.Deepta
teachers.subject: Associate Vice Principal
teachers.quote: Behind you, all your memories. Before you, all your dreams & a world waiting for your light. Around you, all who love you. As you leave this school, carry your roots with pride and let your wings take you to horizons yet unseen. & As you step out to write your next chapter, remember that you will always have a home here at Cornerstone.

teachers.name: Mrs.Kavitha
teachers.subject: Financial Market  Management
teachers.quote: Money well managed builds wealth—but time, discipline, and integrity are the real investments that compound for a lifetime. Manage them wisely, and success will follow.

teachers.name: Mr.Venkat
teachers.subject: Vice Principal - 9 to 12
teachers.quote:
Dear students,
This day marks an important milestone in your lives. The knowledge, values and experiences you gained here will always be your foundation for your next journey.
Success is not only measured in marks but by the effort you put in, the courage you show and the character you build along the way. Dream big, stay focused and never stop learning. Your teachers and school will always be proud of you. 
Wishing you success, happiness and endless opportunities ahead.

teachers.name: Mrs.Esther
teachers.subject: Science-HOD
teachers.quote: As you spread your wings and fly, remember the lessons learnt and the memories created will always be a part of you. Wishing you all the best for your future endeavours- go chase your dreams!

teachers.name: Mrs.Rajini
teachers.subject: English-HOD
teachers.quote: As i write these lines, my heart is filled with pride and nostalgia. Teaching you English was never just about lessons or grammar- it wasabout watching your thoughts grow and your voices become stronger each day.

teachers.name: Mrs.Ancy Thomas
teachers.subject: Social Science-HOD & 9-12 Coordinator
teachers.quote:
You came here with tiny bags and big dreams—and handwriting we could barely read. Today you leave with bigger dreams… and handwriting we still can’t read! 

Go make the world proud—and don’t forget this place where it all began.

teachers.name: Mrs.Pragya
teachers.subject: Hindi-HOD
teachers.quote:
जीवन आपको चाहे जहाँ भी ले जाए, याद रखें कि आपके शिक्षक आप पर विश्वास करते हैं। अपना हौसला बुलंद रखें और अपने सपनों को देखना कभी न छोड़ें!
 "चलते-चलते मेरे ये गीत याद रखना, कभी अलविदा ना कहना!"

teachers.name: Mr.Venu
teachers.subject: Telugu-HOD
teachers.quote:
అందరికి శుభకాంక్షలు 
మీ అందరికి ఉజ్వలమైన భవిష్యత్తు అందాలని ఉన్నా షికారాలకు చేరుకోవాలని..

teachers.name: Mr.Riyaaz
teachers.subject: Mathematics
teachers.quote:
Today we say goodbye, but it is also the start of a new journey for you. We have watched you grow into confident individuals. Always believe in yourselves and work hard for your dreams.
Remember, true success comes from discipline and honesty.

teachers.name: Mr.Chandramohan
teachers.subject: Chemistry
teachers.quote: Motivation is temporary, but discipline is permanent. All the very best for your bright future.

teachers.name: Mrs.Binu
teachers.subject: Biology
teachers.quote: Always remember to aim for the stars!

teachers.name: Mrs.Uma
teachers.subject: Physics
teachers.quote: May your future be bright and full of success. Wishing you happiness, confidence, and great achievements in all that you do.

teachers.name: Mrs.Praveena
teachers.subject: Chemistry
teachers.quote: You are the spark in my journey- the reason my job feels like joy! Your smiles shapes  my morning and your dreams give meaning to my work.

teachers.name: Mrs.Smitha
teachers.subject: English & Curriculum Coordinator
teachers.quote: Keep learning from the world, keep questioning it and write your own life story.

teachers.name: Mrs.Neeta
teachers.subject: Social Science
teachers.quote: I believe every child has a story that comes out from the way the talk, their opinion, their mindset and their body language. Don't let anyone determine your worth.

teachers.name: Mrs. Rashmi
teachers.subject: Hindi
teachers.quote:
हमें आप पर गर्व है।
आपकी मेहनत, अनुशासन और सपने आपको नई ऊँचाइयों तक ले जाएँगे।
हमेशा सीखते रहिए, अच्छे इंसान बनिए और अपने माता-पिता व स्कूल का नाम रोशन कीजिए।
आप सभी के उज्ज्वल भविष्य के लिए मेरी ढेर सारी शुभकामनाएँ

teachers.name: Mrs. Ushabharati
teachers.subject: History & Civics
teachers.quote: Watching your stories unfold has been my greatest joy as a teacher. I have watched you edit your mistakes, refine your arguements and find your rythm. Your passing out grade 10 isn't the end - it's just the lead into a much bigger story.

teachers.name: Mrs. Sridevi
teachers.subject: Computer Science- HOD
teachers.quote: Artificial Intelligence can process data, but only you can dream, question, and innovate. Keep learning, keep exploring, and never stop asking 'why?'

teachers.name: Mr. Ambaiah G
teachers.subject: Mathematics
teachers.quote: Work hard in silence let success make the noise.

teachers.name: Mr. Surendra
teachers.subject: Sanskrit
teachers.quote: Thank you all. I want to give my little advice for life. Please wait for good things to happen. Good things always take time. Never be scared to do something different. Love your family and country

timeline.title: The Beginning
timeline.description: We started this journey together, full of hope and excitement for what lay ahead.

timeline.title: Virtual Bonds
timeline.description: Despite the challenges, we stayed connected and grew closer through screens.

timeline.title: Reunion
timeline.description: Back together again, stronger than ever. The halls echoed with our laughter once more.

timeline.title: Growth & Discovery
timeline.description: Finding our passions, building our dreams, and creating unforgettable memories.

timeline.title: Final Chapter
timeline.description: Our last year together, making every moment count before we say goodbye.

timeline.title: New Beginnings
timeline.description: As we close this chapter, new adventures await. Forever Cornerstone!
